description: Consolidated spec tracker — cross-references spec files, attestations, plans, metric JSONs, and CSV status to determine real completion status of all specified tasks.

status_legend.COMPLETED: All evidence confirms task is done: attestation present, CSV=Completed, plan checkboxes done
status_legend.PARTIALLY_DONE: Some evidence of completion but gaps identified (missing attestation, failing tests, unwired code)
status_legend.SPEC_ONLY: Spec exists but no execution evidence (no attestation, no plan completion, CSV=Backlog)

issues.issue: Attestation confirms completion but CSV shows only 50% complete. Likely a CSV update lag.
issues.recommendation: Update CSV to 100% to match attestation and metric evidence.

issues.issue: Attestation confirms completion but CSV shows only 0% complete. Likely a CSV update lag.
issues.recommendation: Update CSV to 100% to match attestation and metric evidence.

issues.issue: Attestation confirms completion but CSV shows only 0% complete. Likely a CSV update lag.
issues.recommendation: Update CSV to 100% to match attestation and metric evidence.

issues.issue: Attestation confirms completion but CSV shows only 85% complete. Likely a CSV update lag.
issues.recommendation: Update CSV to 100% to match attestation and metric evidence.

issues.issue: Attestation confirms completion but CSV shows only 10% complete. Likely a CSV update lag.
issues.recommendation: Update CSV to 100% to match attestation and metric evidence.

AI Insight Null-State UX (Contact)  -  Add Run AI Analysis button when aiInsight is null on Contact detail page. Lead detail already done 2026-03-04. Pattern: amber dashed-border banner + button wired to scoreWithAI mutation. Invalidate query on success. Follows IFC-095 (Pattern 2  -  scope oversight). Resolves WIRE-IFC-095-001.
Implement real Twilio SMS SDK calls (Resolves R-006)
Wire actual Email Outbound Adapter (Resolves R-018)
Implement Calendar Webhook Ingestion Routes (Resolves R-008)

Convert Lead UX Fix - Backend requires QUALIFIED status but Convert button always visible. Fix: (1) Disable/hide button for non-QUALIFIED leads with guidance tooltip. (2) Add confirmation dialog before conversion. (3) Add createAccount option to conversion flow. (4) Handle conversion errors gracefully. Page: leads/[id]/page.tsx line 1169.

Lead Detail Null-State UX - Fix engagement/churn/sentiment showing raw 'Unknown' string when aiInsight is null. Replace with styled 'Not analyzed' state with visual distinction from real AI data. Page: leads/[id]/page.tsx lines 588, 2258.

Sidebar Broken Links Cleanup - 1 remaining broken navigation link: /deals/trash has no page.tsx (sidebar config deals.ts links to it but route 404s). Original 17 broken nav links and 6 settings links resolved by PG-025/PG-045/PG-174 and other sprint work. Fix: create trash/deleted-deals page at apps/web/src/app/deals/trash/page.tsx OR remove the sidebar item from deals.ts if soft-delete is not yet supported.

Recent Activity Empty State CTA - Overview tab shows generic 'No activities yet' with no call to action. Add 'Log your first activity' CTA button linking to Activity tab textarea. Apply same pattern to Contact detail page. Page: leads/[id]/page.tsx line 1600.

Lead Router Security - Tenant Isolation & Domain Bypass. Fix 4 CRITICAL/MEDIUM security issues: (1) scoreWithAI fire-and-forget uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant - cross-tenant data leak risk [S2]. (2) logActivity $transaction uses raw ctx.prisma - may bypass tenant middleware [S3]. (3) bulkUpdateStatus uses direct Prisma updateMany bypassing Lead.changeStatus() domain validation - skips status transition rules and domain events [S4]. (4) getHotLeads/getReadyForQualification pass userId as ownerId without explicit tenantId [S9]. Fix: Replace ctx.prisma with prismaWithTenant in all cases. Route bulkUpdateStatus through domain model. Add explicit tenantId to hot/ready queries.

Lead Detail Status Type Fix + Auth Guard. Fix 2 CRITICAL issues: (1) LeadStatus type union at leads/[id]/page.tsx line 139 omits NEGOTIATING - runtime crash when lead has this status [S1]. (2) leads/(list)/new/page.tsx missing useRequireAuth() hook - unauthenticated users can access create lead form [F1]. Also fix trpc vs api import inconsistency in create page [F8]. Fix: Add NEGOTIATING to LeadStatus type, add useRequireAuth() to create page, standardize import.

Lead Router Data Integrity Fixes. Fix 5 HIGH issues: (1) update procedure ambiguous status field handling - may silently drop or bypass domain validation [S5]. (2) Score tier thresholds inconsistent - domain LeadScore uses 80/50 but router stats query uses 70/40 [S6]. (3) sortBy accepts arbitrary strings with no enum validation - Prisma orderBy injection risk [S7]. (4) leadListResponseSchema expects 'data' key but router returns 'leads' [W4]. (5) leadResponseSchema missing Lead 360 fields (aiInsight, activities, notes, files, tasks) [D5]. Fix: Explicitly handle status in update, unify thresholds, add sortBy enum, fix schema keys.

Contact Router Security — Tenant Isolation Fixes. CRITICAL: (1) search procedure has no createTenantWhereClause — cross-tenant search by name/email (R-02). (2) logActivity transaction uses raw ctx.prisma with no tenantId in WHERE — cross-tenant update (R-03). (3) bulkEmail/bulkExport no tenant filter — email exfiltration via guessed UUIDs (R-04). (4) stats ignores typedCtx tenant — no tenantId boundary (R-05). (5) getById/getByEmail double-fetch through unscoped domain repo (R-06). Cross-ref: R-01 (prismaWithTenant raw) is cross-cutting and shared with IFC-237. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §15.

Contact Detail NaN Fix + Auth Guard + Status Enum. CRITICAL: (1) NaN% division by zero — emailsOpened/emailsSent at line 1319 renders 'NaN%' when emailsSent=0 (F-01). (2) Create contact page missing useRequireAuth() — unauthenticated access (F-07). (3) Status enum truncated to 3 values in ContactList/ContactCard (ACTIVE/INACTIVE/ARCHIVED) but create form allows 6 values — unknown status crashes detail page statusConfig (F-08). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §16.

Contact Router Data Integrity Fixes. (1) Raw SQL in getTimeline has no tenant filter and .catch(() => []) swallows errors (R-09). (2) sortBy accepts arbitrary strings — enum whitelist needed (R-10). (3) filterOptions ignores status input (R-12). (4) contactListResponseSchema uses 'data' key but router returns 'contacts' (D-03). (5) phone non-nullable in response schema but mapper returns null (D-08/R-14). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §15,§18.

Account Detail No-Op Action Buttons. Wire 6 non-functional buttons: (1) Create Deal button no onClick (F-05, AccountDetail.tsx:229). (2) Add Contact button no onClick in overview (F-06, AccountDetail.tsx:233). (3-4) Add Contact buttons no onClick in contacts tab header and empty state (F-07/F-08, AccountContactsList.tsx:61,85). (5-6) Create Opportunity buttons no onClick in opportunities tab header and empty state (F-10/F-11, AccountOpportunitiesList.tsx:68,116). Each button should open the appropriate create form or association dialog with accountId pre-filled. Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 3-5.

Account Owner Display & Assignment. (1) Owner card shows literal 'Owner Assigned' and 'Account Manager' text instead of actual owner name/title — ownerId exists but owner relation not included in getById (F-01). (2) No owner assignment UI or mutation (F-02). Fix: include owner relation in getById query; display real owner name and role; add owner assignment combobox or dialog with user search mutation. Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 2.

Account Backend Tenant Isolation & Security. (1) CRITICAL: filterOptions uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant for user lookup — tenant data leak (B-01, account.router.ts:445). (2) PrismaAccountRepository has NO tenantId filter on any method — single-layer defense (B-02). (3) existsByName blocks same name across all tenants — should be per-tenant (B-03). (4) sortBy parameter unsanitized — potential Prisma orderBy injection (B-04). (5) TOCTOU window in update/delete without transaction (B-05). (6) Zero audit logging on all account mutations (B-07). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 11-12.

Deal Detail Page — Replace SAMPLE_DEAL with Real API Data. CRITICAL: Entire deal detail page (deals/[id]/page.tsx 792 lines) is 100% hardcoded with SAMPLE_DEAL constant (lines 116-150) — zero API calls. The dealId from useParams() is captured but never used for data fetch (line 684). Must: (1) Replace SAMPLE_DEAL with trpc.opportunity.getById query using dealId param. (2) Add useRequireAuth() guard (F-03 — detail page is the only unguarded page). (3) Fix STAGES constant to match domain 7-stage enum (F-04 — uses CLOSED instead of CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST, omits NEEDS_ANALYSIS). (4) Fix StageProgress to use deal prop instead of SAMPLE_DEAL.value directly (F-05). (5) Remove _SAMPLE_ACTIVITIES dead code (F-06). (6) Add clickable links to account/contact detail pages (F-07). (7) Wire real owner data from getById relation include. Router getById exists (IFC-186). Cross-entity patterns from Lead 360 wiring (2026-03-04) should be followed. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 1.

Deal Create Form + /deals/new Route. No deal creation form exists — both 'New Deal' buttons (deals/(list)/page.tsx lines 454 and 492) link to /deals/new which is a 404 (F-02). Must: (1) Create page at apps/web/src/app/deals/new/page.tsx or deals/(list)/new/page.tsx. (2) Form fields: name, value (money input), stage (default PROSPECTING), probability, expectedCloseDate (date picker), accountId (account search combobox), contactId (contact search combobox). (3) Wire to trpc.opportunity.create mutation. (4) Add useRequireAuth(). (5) Validate with createOpportunitySchema. (6) Success: navigate to /deals/[newId]. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 1 F-02.

Deal Backend Tenant Isolation & Audit Logging. (1) CRITICAL: PrismaOpportunityRepository.findById() (line 82) has NO tenantId WHERE clause — cross-tenant read/write/delete possible via getById/update/delete/moveStage/dealForecast (B-01). Fix: add tenantId to findById() and findByOwnerId() WHERE clauses. (2) CRITICAL: Zero auditLogger.log() calls across all 16 opportunity + pipeline-config procedures (B-02). Add audit logging to create/update/delete/moveStage (especially CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST) and pipeline config changes. (3) Create notification in create procedure uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant (B-03). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 5-6.

Queue Scheduler Administration — Implement queuesAdmin tRPC router with live BullMQ stats and scheduler CRUD (list/pause/resume/retry/delete), wire to /agent-approvals/agents page. Replace stub router with live Redis/BullMQ data. Add queue health panel to ActiveAgentsDashboard showing scheduler cron patterns, queue counts, and action buttons.

AI Monitoring Data Persistence — Replace in-memory singleton monitoring data (driftDetector, latencyMonitor, hallucinationChecker, roiTracker) with DB-backed persistence via new AIMonitoringEvent model. Add ai-worker flush service to write metrics to DB periodically. Rewrite monitoring router to query DB instead of in-process singletons. Enables multi-process deployments to share monitoring data.
